RSX.exit_case: Summit has not yet occurred, but no immediate signs of sanctions or escalation post-meeting are evident.
RSX.assessment: The summit is scheduled to occur soon, with both leaders expressing intentions to discuss the end of the Russia-Ukraine war. The market may react to the potential easing of tensions or continuation of conflict, affecting Russian assets.
RSX.exit_advice: Watch for outcomes of the Trump-Putin summit in Alaska, specifically any announcements regarding sanctions or escalations in the Russia-Ukraine conflict.
